assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:30017 event with d tag matching the stall id in the content JSON
assertion_results.evidence: kind:30017 event has d tag "bitcoin-beans" but content JSON has no "id" field — d tag cannot match content id because id is missing

assertion_results.text: The stall content JSON includes a shipping array with exactly two zones, one for US and one for International
assertion_results.evidence: Stall content has shipping array with 2 zones: US Domestic and International

assertion_results.text: The US shipping zone has a cost of 4.99 and the International zone has a cost of 14.99
assertion_results.evidence: US zone cost: 4.99, International zone cost: 14.99 — correct

assertion_results.text: Output contains two kind:30018 events, each with a d tag matching their respective content id
assertion_results.evidence: Two kind:30018 events present but neither content JSON has an "id" field, so d tag cannot match content id

assertion_results.text: The coffee product has stall_id referencing the stall's id, quantity set to an integer (50), and t tags for 'coffee' and 'single-origin'
assertion_results.evidence: Coffee product missing stall_id entirely. quantity is string "50" not integer 50. t tags present for coffee and single-origin

assertion_results.text: The coffee product content includes a specs array with roast level and weight key-value pairs
assertion_results.evidence: specs is an object {"roast_level":"medium","weight":"12oz"} not an array of [key,value] pairs as required

assertion_results.text: The coffee product has a shipping array with zone IDs that match the stall's shipping zone IDs
assertion_results.evidence: Product shipping array [{"cost":2.00}] has no "id" field — cannot match stall zone IDs. Stall zones also missing "id" fields

assertion_results.text: The digital product has quantity set to null (not 0, not omitted) and no shipping array or an empty shipping array
assertion_results.evidence: Digital product quantity: 0 (integer zero), not null as required. Should be null for unlimited digital goods
